sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this beat-em-up platformer

special_mechanics.name: Power-ups
special_mechanics.description: Game contains power-up system including maximum power-up obtainable via cheat code. Regional differences: Japanese version uses 'abeshi' and 'hidebu' power-ups, US version uses white and black stars.

special_mechanics.name: Projectile System
special_mechanics.description: Japanese version features randomly thrown projectiles from screen sides. US version has reduced projectile difficulty.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - No quantitative movement physics data available in source material. Game is documented as a Spartan X-style beat-em-up with platformer elements. Source contains information about regional differences, debug features, and game design changes between Japanese and US versions, but no specific physics parameters are documented.
sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor: Fist of the North Star (NES)
